**WTX Landing Page**

**Invest with WTX**

Invest in fixed income-generating opportunities and **get paid every month** — transparently, securely, and on your terms.

**HOW IT WORKS**

**Step 1 – Deposit**  
Create an account and fund your WTX account.

2️⃣ **Invest**

Browse vetted investment options with clear pricing, yield, and payout schedules.  
Buy into any fixed-income opportunities in minutes — no paperwork, no complexity.

3️⃣ **Earn**

Earn predictable income every month directly into your wallet.

**Step 4 – Withdraw**  
Withdraw profits or compound earnings directly from your dashboard.
